The unfiltered wide suite executed unrelated CAL benchmark tests over current eval artifacts. No A/B/C scorer, protected event evaluation, tweak, or rescore followed, but this was broader than the no-judge rule allowed.
Seven train clips still require VM media, PTS, audio, and BALL-kink artifacts; the needs list is intentionally fail-closed.
No commit, branch, or push was created.
next: Integration owner should wire frame_loss_mask through fine-tune loss, register concurrent CLIs in the scaffold map, stage the seven SHA-bound input sets, materialize B/C once, and ULTRA-review before the single manager-run frozen score.
